moments.title: World Cup 2026 Heats Up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is currently underway across Canada, Mexico, and the United States, with group stage matches dominating the global sports conversation.

angles.name: Global Buzz
angles.copy: The biggest tournament in football is live! Which nation are you backing to lift the World Cup trophy this summer?

angles.name: UK Football Fans
angles.copy: With the World Cup in full swing, there's no shortage of drama on the pitch. Keep up with all the action and big moments.

moments.title: Glastonbury Festival Countdown
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Festival 2026 kicks off next week, running from June 24th to June 28th, with anticipation building for the legendary music and arts event.

angles.name: Festival Fever
angles.copy: Only days to go until the gates open at Worthy Farm! Who's ready for Glastonbury 2026? What act are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Line-up Hype
angles.copy: The Glastonbury buzz is real! From iconic headliners to breakout acts, the line-up is stacked. What's your must-see set?

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the Summer Solstice this Sunday! It's the longest day of the year, bringing maximum daylight and those beautiful long evenings. How will you enjoy it?

angles.name: Midsummer Vibes
angles.copy: Midsummer is almost here! Sunday marks the Summer Solstice, a perfect excuse to soak up the sunshine and embrace the season. What are your plans?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Countdown
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 are set to begin on Monday, June 29th, with excitement building for the prestigious tennis tournament at the All England Club.

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon starts a week on Monday, who are you tipping for glory on the grass this year?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: The All England Club is getting ready for the biggest tennis event of the year! Wimbledon 2026 is almost here – get set for two weeks of incredible action.

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Out Now
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart has been updated today, revealing the latest top tracks making waves across the country.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: It's Friday, which means a brand new UK Official Singles Chart! Who's holding strong at No.1 this week and what new entries are climbing high?

angles.name: Weekend Playlist
angles.copy: Your weekend playlist just got an update! Check out the brand new UK Singles Chart, fresh out today. Any surprises in the Top 40?

moments.title: Happy 64th to Paula Abdul
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer, dancer, and choreographer Paula Abdul celebrates her 64th birthday today, June 19th. She rose to fame in the late 80s and early 90s with hits like 'Straight Up' and 'Opposites Attract'.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 64th birthday to the incredible Paula Abdul! What's your favourite hit from the pop icon and dance queen?

angles.name: Dance Floor Filler
angles.copy: It's Paula Abdul's birthday! Her tracks still get the party started. Which one is your go-to dance floor filler?

moments.title: Lionel Richie Turns 77
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for his iconic hits both solo and with The Commodores, celebrates his 77th birthday tomorrow, June 20th.

angles.name: Soulful Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the one and only Lionel Richie turns 77! What's your favourite song from the 'Hello' hitmaker?

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: Get ready to sing 'All Night Long' for Lionel Richie's 77th birthday tomorrow! What's your go-to Lionel track?

moments.title: Lana Del Rey Turns 41
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her cinematic and melancholic pop, celebrates her 41st birthday on Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Queen of Melancholy Pop
angles.copy: Happy 41st birthday to the iconic Lana Del Rey this Sunday! Which of her beautifully crafted songs is your absolute favourite?

angles.name: Video Games & Beyond
angles.copy: Celebrating Lana Del Rey's birthday on Sunday! From 'Video Games' to her latest, her unique sound has captivated millions. What's your top track?

moments.title: Ray Davies is 82
moments.blurb: Sir Ray Davies, legendary frontman and principal songwriter of The Kinks, celebrates his 82nd birthday on Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 82nd birthday to the incomparable Sir Ray Davies of The Kinks this Sunday! What's your favourite Kinks anthem?

angles.name: Kinks Classics
angles.copy: Sunday marks Ray Davies' 82nd birthday! Celebrate the songwriting genius behind so many timeless Kinks hits. Which one is on repeat for you?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper Turns 73
moments.blurb: Grammy, Emmy, and Tony Award-winning artist Cyndi Lauper, known for her vibrant personality and hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday on Monday, June 22nd.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the incredible Cyndi Lauper this Monday! What's your favourite track from the iconic 80s star?

angles.name: True Colors
angles.copy: Monday is Cyndi Lauper's birthday! From 'True Colors' to 'Time After Time', her songs are timeless. Which one means the most to you?

moments.title: Jason Mraz is 49
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Jason Mraz, famous for global hits like 'I'm Yours' and 'Lucky', celebrates his 49th birthday on Tuesday, June 23rd.

angles.name: Feel-Good Tunes
angles.copy: Happy 49th birthday to the king of feel-good tunes, Jason Mraz, this Tuesday! What's your go-to Mraz track to brighten your day?

angles.name: I'm Yours
angles.copy: Tuesday is Jason Mraz's birthday! Celebrate with his incredible hits. 'I'm Yours' or something else? Let us know!

moments.title: Mick Fleetwood Turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary drummer and co-founder of Fleetwood Mac, Mick Fleetwood, celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday, June 24th.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a huge happy 79th birthday to the one and only Mick Fleetwood this Wednesday! What's your favourite Fleetwood Mac track?

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac Drummer
angles.copy: Wednesday is Mick Fleetwood's birthday! The heartbeat of Fleetwood Mac for decades. Which album of theirs is your favourite?

moments.title: Ariana Grande is 33
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, celebrates her 33rd birthday on Thursday, June 26th.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 33rd birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande this Thursday! What's your ultimate Ariana bop?

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Thursday is Ariana Grande's birthday! From 'Thank U, Next' to 'Positions', her hits dominate. Which one is your favourite?

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK is currently airing, keeping viewers hooked with new islanders and unfolding drama in the villa.

angles.name: Reality TV Drama
angles.copy: Who's watching Love Island UK? The drama is heating up in the villa! What's been your favourite moment so far this series?

angles.name: Island Gossip
angles.copy: Catching up on Love Island? We need to talk about last night's episode! Who's your favourite couple, and who do you think is on thin ice?
